---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an integration, workflow, API, or demo improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

Who needs this, and what workflow would it improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the feature or interface you would expect.

## Alternatives

What workarounds exist today?

## Security and Data Handling

Would this feature touch document content, API keys, private reviews, or external services?

## Demo Value

Would this improve the public demo, docs, or onboarding experience?
